## Checklist

- [ ] Branch name follows convention (`feat/`, `fix/`, `learn/`, etc.)
- [ ] Commit messages follow `type(scope): description` format
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or `.env` files committed
- [ ] CI passes (or I've explained why it doesn't in the description)
- [ ] I've linked the relevant issue (if applicable)
